common.callOverlayPermMessage: Meendah needs phone access to show caller information when you receive a call.
common.callLogPermMessage: Meendah needs call log access to identify the caller's number on Android 10+.

auth.identifierPlaceholder: Enter your email or mobile number
auth.loginHint: Use your email or mobile number and password.
auth.registerHint: Create a new account to continue.
auth.otpHelper: OTP auth is active now. The current test code is 123456 until we wire real delivery.
auth.otpSent: OTP has been generated successfully. Use the current test code to continue.
auth.identifierValidation: Please enter a valid email address or mobile number.
auth.passwordValidation: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.otpValidation: OTP code must be at least 6 digits.
auth.featureCallerId: Identify unknown callers & see what tags people saved your number with
auth.forgotPasswordHint: Enter your email or phone number and we'll help you recover your account.
auth.emailSentDesc: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}. Check your inbox and follow the instructions.
auth.phoneSupportDesc: SMS password recovery is not available yet. Please contact our support team on Facebook and they will help you reset your password.

tags.title: My Tags
tags.subtitle: Long press any tag to hide or show it again
tags.confirmHideMessage: Are you sure you want to hide the tag "{{text}}"?
tags.confirmShowMessage: Are you sure you want to show the tag "{{text}}"?

phone.noTags: No tags yet. Be the first to tag this number!
phone.shareMessage: Check out this number on Meen Dah: {{number}} — {{name}}
phone.callNotSupported: Calling is not supported on this device
phone.smsNotSupported: SMS is not supported on this device
phone.linkNotSupported: This link is not supported on this device
phone.allTagsAdded: You have already added all available tags for this number
phone.blockConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to block and report {{number}}?
phone.unblockConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to unblock {{number}}?

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: This starter app includes example code to help you get started.
explore.routingDesc: This app has two screens: src/app/index.tsx and src/app/explore.tsx
explore.layoutDesc: The layout file in src/app/_layout.tsx sets up the tab navigator.
explore.platformSupportDesc: You can open this project on Android, iOS, and the web. To open the web version, press w in the terminal running this project.
explore.imagesDesc: For static images, you can use the @2x and @3x suffixes to provide files for different screen densities.
explore.minDigitsHint: Enter at least 11 digits to search

home.dashboardDesc: Welcome to your personalized caller ID dashboard.
home.permissionRationaleMessage: Meendah needs this permission to identify who is calling you.
home.testOverlayDesc: Test the incoming call overlay without waiting for a call.
home.permDescNotifications: Show setup notifications to set Meendah as your caller ID app
home.permDescReadContacts: Identify callers saved in your contacts and show their names
home.permDescReadPhoneState: Required to detect incoming phone calls
home.permDescReadCallLog: Help identify callers from your call history
home.permDescReadPhoneNumbers: Allow access to phone numbers to identify callers
home.permDescOverlay: Show the call overlay popup when a call comes in
home.permDescDefaultCallerId: This is the most important! Without this, nothing works!
home.permDescIgnoreBattery: Allow Meendah to run in the background to detect calls
home.experimentalMethod3: Method 3: All apps that can draw overlay

contacts.syncDesc: Syncing your contacts helps us identify unknown callers for everyone. We respect your privacy and don't share your data.
contacts.permissionReason: We need contact access to identify unknown callers.
contacts.tagHint: A tag will be added to selected contacts.
